text:
Any person aggrieved by a final decision in a contested case before the Department under this chapter is entitled to judicial review of the decision in the manner provided by chapter 233B of NRS.

INSURANCE REQUIRED
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.140 — Judicial review.

Any person aggrieved by a final decision in a contested case before the Department under this chapter is entitled to judicial review of the decision in the manner provided by chapter 233B of NRS.

INSURANCE REQUIRED

subsections.text: Any person aggrieved by a final decision in a contested case before the Department under this chapter is entitled to judicial review of the decision in the manner provided by chapter 233B of NRS.
